files.description: Damage boost definitions and calculations. Defines the BOOST_DEFS array (30+ boost entries) and helper functions for specific boost mechanics like Penance (HP-threshold damage scaling), Frenzy, and Minion Absorption. Each BoostDef specifies source name, multiplier, type (dmg/heal), condition, optional attack-type restrictions, proc scaling, and toggle support.
files.purpose: Central registry of all conditional damage/heal boosts in the game, used by the build engine to compute total damage multipliers

files.description: Massive buff/debuff data module. Defines BUFF_DEFS (100+ buff/debuff definitions with colors, descriptions, effects), BASIC_DEBUFF_POOL, and the entire buff pipeline: weapon art buffs, True Balance conversions, perk-specific modifiers, generic debuff modifiers, Trickster reflection, Tailwind→Whirlwind conversion, Toxin Transfer duration, Cauterize conversion, burn application counting, and the assembleActiveBuffs orchestrator. Also provides getBuffDescription, calcBuffEffect, calcPotencyPercent, and formatPerkDescription utilities.
files.purpose: Core data and logic for all buffs/debuffs in the game. Defines what buffs exist, how they are modified by perks, and orchestrates the full active buff assembly pipeline

files.description: Typed damage boost calculations. Defines TYPED_DMG_BOOST_DEFS for element-specific multipliers (Glyph Conduit→magic, Rage→physical+conditional, Photosynthesis→holy+earth, Hex Shield→all types). calcTypedDmgBoosts iterates defs, resolves potency from either buff state or perk amount, and returns per-type damage multipliers and heal multipliers.
files.purpose: Computes element-specific damage and heal multipliers that stack multiplicatively per damage type

files.description: Automatic debuff generation based on player perks and conditions. getAutoDebuffs evaluates Exhaust→Burn, Penance→Bleed (HP threshold), Melting Shred→Anti Heal, Fungal Prototype→Poison, Venom Spitter→Poison, Bellowing Ember→Burn (HP threshold), Frostbite→Slowness, Gelid Lance→Bleed (requires Slowness), Weakening→Weakness, Sunburn→Burn, and enemy HP-based debuffs. calcActualHpFillPct adjusts HP fill percentage when negative protection reduces effective max HP.
files.purpose: Determines which debuffs are automatically applied to enemies based on the player's perk configuration and current state

files.description: Pure constants file exporting 120+ numeric constants for buff/debuff potency, duration, scaling coefficients, and modifier values. Covers rune-granted buffs, weapon art buffs, True Balance conversions, perk buff factories, buff potency modifiers, generic debuff modifiers, and specific item/perk constants like Bounce duration, Gladiatorial Rage, Glyph Conduit, Endless Despair, and Stored Corruption.
files.purpose: Single source of truth for all buff/debuff numeric tuning constants, consumed by BuffData.ts and other modules

files.description: Critical hit calculation system. Defines natural crit sources (Dexterity, Seismic Momentum, Flowing Crits/Air, Spell Slinger/Magic, Sharp Crits/Physical, Perfection), extra crit sources (Carrying Winds, Caci King Spirit), and crit damage sources (Thief Training, Venom Eater, Vital Strikes, Spark, Critical Master, Splinter). calcCrit computes natural + extra crit chances (combined via 1-∏(1-p)), applies Primal divisor, proc coefficient scaling (positiveOnly for natural, ignore for Carrying Winds), and crit damage multiplier. Returns detailed CritResult with breakdowns.
files.purpose: Computes critical hit chance, effective crit chance with proc coefficient, crit damage multiplier, and detailed breakdowns for display

files.description: Main build calculation engine. calcBuild orchestrates the full pipeline: accumulateEquipment (race, guild, armor×3 with enchantments, ring, rune, weapon [monk vs standard], infusions) → finalizePerks (apply Perk Effectiveness/Cursed, Buckler→Parry, grantor→potency tags) → deriveResults (round stats, calcCDR, applyStatBoostPerks, Emotional attack speed, Gladiatorial Rage armor pen, calcCrit, calcWardingDebuffMultiplier, computeBuffs, maxBuffPotency for rage/bounce/quickdraw/tailwind/burn, self-debuff count, HP fill adjustment, calcBoosts). Exports BuildResult with stats, perks, CDR, boosts, and crit.
files.purpose: Top-level orchestrator that takes a BuildState and produces the complete build calculation result including stats, perks, cooldown reduction, damage boosts, and crit analysis

edges.description: Imports StatKey, StatMap, ArmorPart, EnchantSlot, BuildState, STAT_KEYS, applyUpgrade, BoostEntry, BoostResult
Imports getActiveBuildBuffs, getPerkBuffs, getWeaponArtBuffs, applyBuffPerkModifiers, convertTailwindToWhirlwind, assembleActiveBuffs, BUFF_DEFS
Uses BOOST_DEFS and BoostContext for damage boost calculations
Calls calcTypedDmgBoosts for element-specific multipliers (via deriveResults indirectly)
BuffData provides buff state that TypedDmgBoost consumes
Auto-debuffs produce GrantedBuff instances following BuffData's interface
Crit results feed into Boost calculations (naturalCritChance used in BoostContext)
Transitively depends on buff constants through BuffData.ts
Both contribute to the active buff assembly in the build pipeline

summary: Batch 2 covers the damage calculation core: boost definitions (Boost.ts), buff/debuff data and assembly pipeline (BuffData.ts), typed damage multipliers (TypedDmgBoost.ts), automatic debuff generation (perkAutoDebuffs.ts), buff constants (crit.ts), critical hit math (crit.ts), and the main build engine (build.ts). These 7 files form the computational heart of the damage calculator, processing equipment stats through perk finalization, crit computation, buff assembly, and boost aggregation.
